title: erythroxylum laurifolium
intro: Erythroxylum laurifolium, also known as the leafy coca or Peruvian coca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and stimulant effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum laurifolium include relief from altitude sickness, improved cognitive function, and reduced fatigue. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
